title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.384 - Officer Stephen Strehl Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route M in Barnhart
text:
227.384.  Officer Stephen Strehl Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route M in Barnhart. — The portion of State Route M between Old Lemay Ferry Road and Moss Hollow Road in the census designated place with more than six thousand one hundred but fewer than six thousand three hundred inhabitants shall be designated the "Officer Stephen Strehl Memorial Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56)
